themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 10 verses. Commentary leans on "Thus speaketh the LORD of hosts, saying, Execute true judgment, and shew mercy and compassion...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֱמֶת֙: true - stability; (figuratively) certainty, truth, trustworthiness".
